mapper.select:
select * from user
(username = #{condition}) or email = #{condition} or phone = #{condition}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN u.status = '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS normalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN u.status = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS bannedCount, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ur.user_id) FROM user_role ur INNER JOIN role r ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE r.role_code = 'ADMIN') AS adminCount FROM user u

select u.id as userId,u.nickname,u.avatar, (COUNT(a.id) * 10 + CASE WHEN u.last_login_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as activeScore from user u left join article a on u.id = a.user_id and a.status='1' and a.updated_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) group by u.id order by activeScore desc limit #{size}
